title: Wrong result when compare 'null' with subquery result
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 INT, c2 INT, c3 VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT NULL);
INSERT INTO t1 VALUES(10, 10, 'value1'), (20, NULL, 'value2'), (30, 30, NULL);
SELECT CASE WHEN ('b', NULL) IS DISTINCT FROM (SELECT 'b', c2 FROM t1 WHERE c2 IS NULL) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END;
